name: progress
description: Determinate / indeterminate progress in four visual forms (line, circle, dashboard, steps). WAI-ARIA 1.2 progressbar role; aria-valuenow omitted for indeterminate; variant intent tokens; striped + animated stripes; showValue label; trailing and footer content slots. CSP-clean, zero JS, server-rendered.
docs: Copies the progress partial to your JTE root at lievit/progress.jte. Reached as @template.lievit.progress(value: 42, max: 100, label: "Uploading"). Pass value=null for the indeterminate animation. Four forms: line (default), circle, dashboard, steps. Variants: default, info, success, warning, destructive. The three @keyframes (lv-progress-slide, lv-progress-stripe-move, lv-progress-arc-spin) must be included from lievit-tokens.css.
